channel.title: af.mil News (sample)
channel.description: Sample af.mil feed for offline scraper testing.

item.title: Air Force squadron uses generative AI to accelerate Arctic exercise planning
item.description: An air mobility squadron leveraged a generative AI platform to draft tabletop exercise scenarios in minutes.

item.title: Research lab demonstrates autonomous drone swarm coordination
item.description: Air Force researchers demonstrated AI-coordinated autonomous unmanned aircraft operating as a swarm.

item.title: Base hosts annual airshow for local families
item.description: A community airshow welcoming local families to the base for a day of flight demonstrations.
